name: Barbecued Short Ribs
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Water, or enough to barely cover ribs
recipeInstructions: The day before grilling the ribs, place sugar and vinegar in a large pot. Heat over medium on the stove until the mixture reduces to form a syrup with the sugar, about 8 minutes. Watch carefully; the syrup may darken quickly. Add broth, water, catsup, tomato paste, mustard, Worcestershire sauce, ground cloves, chili powder, and cayenne pepper, then bring to a boil. Cook ribs (or chicken) in the liquid for 20 minutes (10 minutes if using chicken). Remove ribs from the liquid and cover tightly; refrigerate. The next day, grill over charcoal. Place ribs off the direct heat so smoke collects inside. If no cover is available, improvise with aluminum foil. Grill until well heated, basting every 10 minutes with barbecue sauce. Serve ribs on a platter with remaining sauce side.
